---
title: "00 Execution Runbook (HCC)"
author: "subhash"
date: "2026-04-28"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Purpose

This runbook is an operations-focused companion to the overall resource
notebook. It provides clean command blocks for running the full manuscript
pipeline on HCC.

# Preconditions

- Repository cloned on HCC at `/home/jyanglab/subhash/sorghum-variant-calling-resource`
- Slurm available (`sbatch`)
- Required module stacks available (`samtools`, `fastp`, `bwa-mem2`, `picard`, `gatk4`)
- `final_922_samples.txt` present in `metadata/curated/`

# 1) Initialize Resource Structure

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
cd /home/jyanglab/subhash/sorghum-variant-calling-resource/scripts/manuscript_resource
bash 01_prepare_hcc_directories.sh
bash 02_build_manifests.sh
```

# 2) Submit Pipeline Steps

## Step 01 to Step 04 (sample-level preprocessing)

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
bash 03_step01_cram_to_fastq_submit.sh
bash 04_step02_fastp_submit.sh
bash 05_step03_alignment_submit.sh
bash 06_step04_picard_submit.sh
```

## Step 05 to Step 10 (joint variant calling and filtering)

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
bash 07_step05_bqsr_haplotypecaller_submit.sh
bash 08_step06_genomicsdb_import_submit.sh
bash 09_step07_genotype_gvcfs_submit.sh
bash 10_step08_gather_raw_vcf_submit.sh
bash 11_step09_filter_snps_submit.sh
bash 12_step10_filter_indels_submit.sh
```

# 3) Monitor Submitted Jobs

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
squeue -u "$USER"

# Replace with actual job IDs from your submission chain
sacct -j 14996681,14996682,14996683,14996684,14996685 --format=JobID,JobName,State,ExitCode,Elapsed
```

# 4) Check Required Artifacts

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
# Step 08 output required by Steps 09 and 10
ls -lh /work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/RAW_vcf/RAW_SAP_BQSR.vcf.gz

# Final outputs
ls -lh /work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/final_vcf/results/SAP_BQSR_filtered_snps.vcf.gz
ls -lh /work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/final_vcf/results/SAP_BQSR_filtered_indels.vcf.gz
```

# 5) Cohort/Manifest Integrity Checks

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
wc -l /work/jyanglab/subhash/BQSR/samples.tsv
wc -l /work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/sample_maps/gdb_sample_map_922.tsv
wc -l /work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/scripts/genotype_5mb_manifest.tsv
wc -l /work/jyanglab/subhash/6.genomicsdb_5mb/genotype_vcfs/scripts/vcf_list_manifest_order.txt
```

# Notes

- Keep all large outputs on HCC storage (`/work/...`).
- Keep only metadata, scripts, and workflow docs in this Git repository.
